codebuild.sourcecredential.AuthType.Docs: The type of authentication used by the credentials. Valid options are OAUTH, BASIC_AUTH, or PERSONAL_ACCESS_TOKEN.

codebuild.sourcecredential.ServerType.Docs: The type of source provider. The valid options are GITHUB, GITHUB_ENTERPRISE, or BITBUCKET.

codebuild.sourcecredential.Token.Docs: For GitHub or GitHub Enterprise, this is the personal access token. For Bitbucket, this is the app password.

codebuild.sourcecredential.Username.Docs: The Bitbucket username when the `authType` is BASIC_AUTH. This parameter is not valid for other types of source providers or connections.
